default.$description: Default text color for interactive elements in resting state

lufa.useCase: Button labels, input text, interactive element labels

hover.$description: Text color when hovering over interactive elements - maintains readability

lufa.useCase: Hover state text for buttons and interactive elements

active.$description: Text color when pressing/clicking interactive elements

disabled.$description: Text color for disabled interactive elements - low contrast indicates non-interactive

lufa.useCase: Disabled button text, disabled input text, non-interactive labels

focus.$description: Text color for focused interactive elements — same as default. Text color does not change on focus; the focus ring provides the visual indicator.

lufa.useCase: Focused button text, focused input text — text color unchanged
lufa.note: Text color does not change on focus by design. Use semantic.interactive.focus.ring for the visual focus indicator.
